problem: parseCsvLine(line) in csv.mjs splits a CSV line into fields. It just splits on commas, so it breaks on quoted fields: parseCsvLine('a,"b,c",d') should be ['a','b,c','d']. Fix it to handle double-quoted fields that may contain commas, and the "" escape for a literal quote inside a quoted field (e.g. '"x""y"' is the single value x"y). Unquoted and empty fields must keep working. Make all cases in test.mjs pass.
